question_text: In a college, there are three student clubs. Sixty students are only in the Drama club. 80 students are only in the Dance club, 30 students are only in the Maths club. 40 students are in both Drama and Dance clubs. 12 students are in both Dance and Maths clubs, 7 students are in both Drama and Maths clubs, and 2 students are in all the clubs. If 75% of the students in the college are not in any of these clubs, then the total number of students in the college is ________.
